table.name: AVLS Switchover Load Threshold 1
table.description: AVLS cam switchover load threshold curve 1 (hysteresis pair with Threshold 2). Above/below this load line (with +/-10.0 hysteresis from the offsets at 0x7D480/0x7D484) the ECU requests the other cam profile. Load compared is the value at RAM 0xFFFFCF94. Stock: RPM 1600, 2000, 2400, 2800, 3200, 3600, 4000 -> load 100, 100, 30, 28, 25, 15, 5. NOTE: engage-vs-release direction of curves 1 and 2 is not yet confirmed from code; log cam mode at RAM 0xFFFFCD86 (1 = low cam, 3 = high cam) to verify.

table.name: AVLS Switchover Load Threshold 2
table.description: AVLS cam switchover load threshold curve 2 (hysteresis pair with Threshold 1). Stock: RPM 2000, 2050, 2400, 2800, 3200, 3600, 4000 -> load 100, 100, 90, 50, 30, 10, 0. See Threshold 1 description for logic and the engage/release caveat.

table.name: AVLS High Cam Engage RPM
table.description: Hard RPM override: at or above this engine speed the high cam profile is forced on regardless of load (sets bit 0x10 at RAM 0xFFFFCD9E). Stock: 4000. Pairs with AVLS High Cam Release RPM (stock 3800) for hysteresis; keep engage above release.

table.name: AVLS High Cam Release RPM
table.description: Below this engine speed the hard high-cam RPM override is released (load-based curves take over again). Stock: 3800. Must stay below AVLS High Cam Engage RPM.

table.name: AVLS Switchover Load Hysteresis A
table.description: Load hysteresis offset applied around the switchover threshold curves (side A). Stock: 10.0. Widening this reduces cam-mode hunting near the threshold line.

table.name: AVLS Switchover Load Hysteresis B
table.description: Load hysteresis offset applied around the switchover threshold curves (side B). Stock: 10.0.

table.name: AVLS Actuation Minimum RPM
table.description: Minimum engine speed gate for OSV (oil switching valve) actuation, checked in avls_osv_actuation_gate @ 0x405CC. Below this the high-cam actuation is not commanded even if requested. Stock: 3000.
